name: ESM2_score_missense_variant
description: Score a missense protein variant with ESM-2 masked-marginal log-likelihood ratio (Meier 2021) over HuggingFace's keyless hf-inference. Input wild-type 1-letter sequence + 1-based position + mutant residue; returns LLR = logP(mut) - logP(wt). Negative => mutant disfavored (candidate deleterious). No API key. For ESMC/SAE scoring with a key use ESM_score_sequence.

sequence.description: Wild-type protein sequence in 1-letter amino-acid code (whitespace is ignored).

position.description: 1-based residue position of the variant within the sequence.

mutant.description: Mutant amino acid (single 1-letter code, one of the 20 standard residues).

wild_type.description: Optional wild-type residue (1-letter). If given, it is validated against the residue at `position` to catch coordinate/sequence mismatches.

model_id.description: ESM-2 model to use. Default 'facebook/esm2_t33_650M_UR50D'. Other sizes: esm2_t30_150M_UR50D, esm2_t12_35M_UR50D, esm2_t6_8M_UR50D.

wait_for_model.description: If true, block until the model finishes loading on the HF servers instead of returning a retryable 'loading' status.
